code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test07-SEP-2023Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, indicating impaired renal function, and significant proteinuria, glycosuria, and ketonuria, suggesting possible diabetic nephropathy or another renal pathology despite low HbA1c. Urine is cloudy, brown, and has low specific gravity, further supporting renal dysfunction. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further assessment for underlying causes.
